历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 2177 → 2023: 1510 → 2024: 894 → 2025: 747. Over the past four years, the ranking has continuously and significantly moved forward, with a cumulative advance of about 1430 places, indicating a year-on-year increase in application popularity; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 747. In 2022, the plan was 82 people → 2023: 77 → 2024: 57 → 2025: 35 (Physics Category), showing a year-on-year decreasing trend; the 2026 plan is 36 people, a slight expansion of about 2.9% compared to 2025, with limited expansion impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university, member of the C9 League; Soft Science Chinese University Rankings: 2021: 11th → 2022: 13th → 2023: 13th → 2024: 16th → 2025: 14th → 2026: 12th. In recent years, the ranking has been stable with an upward trend, firmly among the top universities in the country; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin heat total ranking 10th (high heat), comprehensive heat approximately 4.54 million, extremely high attention on short video platforms, reflecting sustained strong application popularity; in 2024, there was a medium-attention signal of abnormal admission cutoffs, but the continuous forward movement of rankings in recent years indicates that the impact has been absorbed; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 17 disciplines received A- or above, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, etc., with engineering strength at the national top level, strongly attracting high-scoring science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended popular majors, highly matching HIT's advantageous disciplines; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Sichuan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025, with an estimated 329,000 Physics Category candidates (+15.5%), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, belonging to the Northeast region, which is an inter-provincial study for Sichuan candidates; the proportion of enrollment in Sichuan in recent years is about 3%-4%, with 142 people enrolled in Sichuan in 2025 (including all campuses), making it a medium-scale source province; regional preference for the Northeast is average, but top engineering strength can effectively offset regional disadvantages.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+2.9%), the significant increase in the number of candidates in Sichuan Province (+15.5%), the rise of the school's Soft Science ranking to 12th, the high Douyin heat attention, and the sustained popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that competition will further intensify in 2026, and the ranking will continue to move forward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 730, with a range of 647-813.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<647), you can focus on reaching for the Top Class and Academician Special Class.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 2106 → in 2024 it was 1170 → in 2025 it was 1219. Rankings have fluctuated significantly in recent years, with a substantial forward shift in 2024 followed by a slight backward shift in 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1219. The enrollment plan was 15 students in 2022 → 5 in 2024 → 10 in 2025 (History Category), showing considerable fluctuation. The 2026 plan is 8 students, a 20% reduction compared to 2025, which is significant and will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, member of the C9 League. Ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in the country, with brand appeal to liberal arts candidates as well. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 10th overall (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of approximately 4.54 million, indicating extremely high attention on short video platforms and reflecting strong overall application enthusiasm. HIT is known for its engineering strengths, with limited liberal arts enrollment majors (Economics and Management Experimental Class). Related discipline evaluations: Management Science and Engineering A, Business Administration A-, but liberal arts majors are not the university's traditional strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Economics and Management is divided and wait-and-see. Liberal arts candidates' enthusiasm for HIT's liberal arts majors is relatively stable. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Sichuan Province is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025. The estimated number of History Category candidates is about 206,000 (+15.2%), indicating a significant expansion in candidate scale and intensified competition. Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, which is an inter-provincial study for Sichuan liberal arts candidates. Liberal arts enrollment is limited to only one major category, the Economics and Management Experimental Class, offering limited major choices. The combined attractiveness of region and major is moderate.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, a 20% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase in the number of candidates in Sichuan Province (+15.2%), and the university's overall high brand popularity, competition is expected to intensify in 2026, with rankings moving forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1053, with a range of 933-1173.
